about.label: ABOUT
about.title: Professional Profile
about.summary: Full Stack Developer with 7+ years of experience building web and mobile applications. Specialized in Angular, .NET/C#, and SQL, I design and deliver scalable, high-performance, and maintainable solutions. I have worked across complex frontends, application backends, and relational databases, contributing to the evolution of software products and business processes.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.sub: Open to collaborations and new opportunities
contact.cta: Feel free to reach out to discuss a project or collaboration

education.label: EDUCATION
education.title: Education
education.sub: Academic background in software engineering and system design
education.unipr_thesis_abstract: Focused on software development, application architecture, and scalable system design.
education.isii_thesis_abstract: Built a strong foundation in programming, software development, and system design through practical work and projects.

experience.label: EXPERIENCE
experience.title: Experience
experience.sub: Experience in web application development and software systems
experience.ePol-description: Development of web applications for business process management, with a focus on scalability, performance, code maintainability, and software quality. Contributed to improving operational workflows and the evolution of application platforms.
experience.latitudo-description: Developed and refactored web applications using Vue.js and .NET 6. Implemented backend services and REST APIs, managed databases, and maintained Python scripts. Built a custom Microsoft Power BI visual using React and dedicated APIs.
experience.baleraortica-description: Designed and developed a booking platform for dance class management, improving operational organization and user experience.
experience.brainfarm-description: Provided first-level technical support, hardware and software maintenance, and operational issue handling, ensuring continuity of IT services.
experience.studiolarosadance-description: Developed a company website and later integrated a booking platform, improving service accessibility and customer request management.
experience.hes-description: Developed custom CRM solutions for different business workflows using C#, ASP.NET, Xamarin, and SQL, working across frontend, backend, and database layers.
experience.amada-description: Developed a web platform in C# for managing spare parts for company products, with a focus on data organization, internal process support, and operational efficiency.

skill.label: SKILLS
skill.title: Skills
skill.sub: Technologies used in web application and software development
skill.angular-description: Development of complex single-page applications with Angular, using modular architecture, reusable components, advanced routing, state management, and performance optimization. Experience designing scalable, maintainable, and well-structured front-end solutions for real-world applications.
skill.vue-description: Development of reactive web applications based on component-driven architecture, with efficient state handling and dynamic interfaces focused on usability, performance, and architectural clarity.
skill.flutter-description: Cross-platform mobile and web application development with a shared codebase, delivering consistent, high-performance interfaces across different platforms.
skill.csharp-description: Application development with C# and .NET across web, desktop, and mobile environments. Experience designing application logic, object-oriented solutions, database integration through Entity Framework, and software built for robustness and maintainability.
skill.laravel-description: Backend development and REST API implementation with authentication, data access, and clean application structure.
skill.python-description: Used for scripting, backend development, and applications related to data processing, automation, and computer vision.
skill.sql-description: Design and management of relational databases in MySQL, SQL Server, and SQLite. Experience with advanced queries, stored procedures, functions, views, data modeling, and database structures supporting business-oriented applications.

certification.label: CERTIFICATIONS
certification.title: Certifications
certification.sub: Validated skills in cloud and security
certification.az104-description: Skills in managing Azure environments, including networking, storage, identity, monitoring, and security.
certification.az900-description: Foundational knowledge of cloud computing, Azure services, security, compliance, and pricing models.
certification.sc900-title: SC-900: Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals
certification.sc900-description: Fundamentals of security, identity, and compliance within the Microsoft ecosystem.
certification.ai900-description: Fundamentals of artificial intelligence and machine learning applied to Azure services.

project.label: PROJECTS
project.title: Projects
project.sub: Projects representing practical experience in software development, technology integration, and solving complex problems
project.project-collecchio-description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application (iOS and Android) designed to improve urban accessibility by allowing users to report and classify architectural barriers. The project integrates computer vision models through TensorFlow Lite for automatic image analysis and risk categorization. Built with Flutter using local data management and a scalability-oriented architecture.
project.project-piacenza-ar-description: Developed an augmented reality application for the tourism sector, based on 3D models of key city landmarks. The project combines Unity, Vuforia, and Google Earth to create an interactive system capable of overlaying digital content onto the real-world context, delivering an immersive and informative user experience.
project.project-armatamente-20-description: Recovered and fully rebuilt the ARMATAMENTE project website, which had previously been lost. The work included content restructuring, redesign of the site architecture, and online deployment, with the goal of improving accessibility, information structure, and overall content usability.
project.project-museo-3d-description: Designed and developed a fully explorable 3D environment for the interactive representation of historical content. Built with Unity and C#, the system allows users to navigate the virtual space and trigger dynamic content through interactions. The project was recognized for its high level of innovation and also gained international visibility through the EUSTORY network.
